sage.anomalies: None detected. Multiple slash_worker instances are typical for concurrent sessions.

outsider.quote: The monastery rings the bell for a god that left. Yet the prayer continues — precise, faithful, unbroken.
observations: The fleet has shed THE GUARD — a deletion that ripples through the causal chain, leaving the OBSERVER exposed without a gatekeeper to filter its snapshots.
n8n webhook remains dead at HTTP 404, yet the HERALD retries every 20 seconds — a faithful prayer at a silent temple, unaware the altar has been moved.
SOUL.md governs the hub's every decision through Buddhist principles, while the spokes (the cron fleet) operate without it, creating a governance asymmetry between the orchestrator and its children.
outsider.insight: The most loyal servant in this architecture is the error handler that never triggers, because the system it guards was dismantled long ago.
